body.title: /design skill — optional session-marker for design blocks
body.result: Created ~/.claude/skills/design/SKILL.md — marker for design-mode blocks. Writes DESIGN_START to session, sets design_mode flag. /decided infers scope from last DESIGN_START or prior /decided. Optional — most conversations work without it.
body.description:
Lightweight marker: 'we are in design mode, not sprint mode'. Sets a boundary that /decided uses to infer scope (last /decided OR last /design, whichever newer).

## Flow
- Writes a DESIGN_START marker to session record
- Tags session as design-mode (optional nudge: fewer proactive edits, more 'what about X?')
- /decided reads the most recent DESIGN_START or prior /decided as its scope-start boundary

## Explicitly optional
Most conversations are implicit designs; /decided works without /design. /design is for when you want to explicitly bracket a session.

## Not in scope
- Any behavioral enforcement — just a marker.
